creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text: Nathan, the only user of this library is deskutils/gtg and it's version in ports doesn't work with liblarch 3, so I don't approve this patch - it will break gtg runtime. From other side, gtg/liblarch is effectively dead for some time - last release was in 2013 or so, and I'm planning to deprecate both ports soon. Thank you anyway.
